Our Campuses

Education at Ibn Haldun University continues at Başakşehir, Süleymaniye, and Bakırköy Taş Mektep Campuses.

Bakırköy Taş Mektep Campus: Taş Mektep Campus in Bakırköy serves as Ibn Haldun University Continuing Education Center.
